title: opiliaceae
intro: The Opiliaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the Bailloniaceae or Olacaceae. This family includes about 35 to 40 genera and approximately 400 to 500 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plants within the Opiliaceae family are often characterized by their small, greenish flowers and woody stems, with many species having edible fruits or berries. Opiliaceae is a relatively small family of plants, but it is diverse and widespread across various parts of the world.
